3200780.name: Marionetes
3200780.description:
в–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙ

Have you ever thought about being discarded just for being yourself?

This is the story of the Lady of Strings. Thrown into the scorching furnace by her creator, she is saved by the very strings that once imprisoned her. Now, she must learn how to live while fighting for her freedom. Marionetes is a 3D platformer with an engaging narrative.

в–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙ

Features:

в–ҙ Navigate through the Pinocoli Mobile Mechanical Circus in search of your freedom
в–ҙ An unusual, emotional, and captivating story
в–ҙ Cinematic, intense camera work that pulls you into the experience
в–ҙ Collect secrets and hidden items scattered throughout every corner
в–ҙ An original, captivating soundtrack that follows every step of the journey
в–ҙ Unique movement mechanics that challenge the way you play
в–ҙ Made by humansвҖҰ and a cat

в–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙв–ҫв–ҫв–ҙ

Born from passion and crafted by students, Marionetes delivers a heartfeltВ story and an intimate, personal gameplay experience.
